CustomField.label: State Risk Context
CustomField.description: Pre-composed litigation risk briefing for the state where this inspection occurs. Populated by NEPA_Permit_Issued_Schedule_Creator from NEPA_State_Risk_Profile__mdt.Field_Inspector_Warning__c. Rendered as a read-only risk panel at the top of the nepaFieldInspectionCard LWC in the F-05 mobile OmniScript. Includes challenger win rate, dominant plaintiffs, and primary challenge types derived from 761 PermitTEC cases.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Litigation risk context for this inspection state. Read-only — populated automatically at permit issuance from the 761-case PermitTEC corpus.
